cfg_statements.code: def strongconnect(v): nonlocal index idx[v] = index low[v] = index index += 1 stack.append(v); onstack.add(v) for w in graph.get(v, []): if w not in idx: strongconnect(w) low[v] = min(low[v], low[w]) elif w in onstack: low[v] = min(low[v], idx[w]) if low[v] == idx[v]: comp = [] while True: w = stack.pop() onstack.remove(w) comp.append(w) if w == v: break sccs.append(comp)
for v in graph: if v not in idx: strongconnect(v)
if v not in idx: strongconnect(v)

if w not in idx: strongconnect(w) low[v] = min(low[v], low[w]) elif w in onstack: low[v] = min(low[v], idx[w])
elif w in onstack: low[v] = min(low[v], idx[w])
if low[v] == idx[v]: comp = [] while True: w = stack.pop() onstack.remove(w) comp.append(w) if w == v: break sccs.append(comp)
while True: w = stack.pop() onstack.remove(w) comp.append(w) if w == v: break
